name: webui-openapi-codegen
description: Isolated OpenAPI TypeScript codegen. openapi-typescript uses the classic TypeScript compiler API (ts.factory), which the native TypeScript 7 package no longer ships, so this tool stays on classic TypeScript. Standalone package with its own node_modules and lockfile — it must NOT be a webui npm workspace, otherwise its typescript would hoist onto webui's TypeScript 7.
